title: neolitsea sieboldii var. angustifolia
intro: Neolitsea sieboldii var. angustifolia, also known as Japanese variegated neolitsea or Japanese variegated boxwood, is a plant species belonging to the family Lauraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and aiding in digestion. In herbal preparations, Neolitsea sieboldii var. angustifolia is often used to make teas, infusions, and tonics, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
